Log inGet started

Skills for skills, or skills for money

Teach what you know.
Learn what you need.

Trade skills for skills (free swap) or skills for money (paid sessions). Create a profile, get matched, and book video sessions.

Create free profile Browse skills

How it works

From profile to session in a few steps.

1

Create profile

List skills you can offer and skills you want to learn.

2

Get matched

Trade skills for skills (free) or skills for money (paid). Swap with matched partners or book experts.

3

Book sessions

Free skill-swap calls or paid expert sessions—all through our built-in video chat.

4

Rate & level up

Rate each other after sessions. Build your skill levels and earn badges.

5

Stay accountable

If you don't deliver the skills you agreed to, we'll follow up with you.

Ways to exchange

Skills for skills, or skills for money. Everyone stays accountable.

Skills for skills

Free swap: you teach them something, they teach you something. No money involved.

Skills for money

Pay for expert sessions. Set your rate or book paid sessions (30% CEO share).

Stay accountable

If you don't give the other person the skills you agreed to in a swap, we'll follow up with you.

No screenshots. Do not take screenshots of sessions or private chats.

Premium features

Unlock more with Pro.

AI skill-matching

Smarter matches based on your goals and availability.

Verified Expert badge

Earn the red Verified Expert badge once you have Pro, are trusted by 20 people, and have completed 50 sessions.

Recorded session storage

Save and replay past sessions for review.

Certificates

Earn certificates after completing skill tracks.

Business collaboration

Dedicated section for startups and teams.

Simple pricing

Free to start. Upgrade when you need more.

Free

$0,00

Forever free

  • Profile & skill listing
  • Basic matching
  • Video chat sessions
  • Ratings & reviews
  • Skill levels
Get started

Pro

Free 3 days, then per month

  • Everything in Free
  • AI skill-matching
  • Verified expert badge
  • Recorded session storage
  • Certificates

Paid expert sessions: 30% CEO share. Featured profile ads available.

Join thousands learning and teaching real skills. No subscription required to start.
